channel.title: Jattaba Youth Development Association
channel.description: Recent content on Jattaba Youth Development Association

item.title: Reports
item.description:
Reports

Access our organizational reports and documents to stay informed about our activities, finances, and governance.

Financial Reports

Our financial reports provide transparency about our income, expenditures, and how we manage our resources to serve the community.

  • Financial Report 2025 (PDF)
  • Financial Report 2024 (PDF)
  • Financial Report 2023 (PDF)
  • Annual Budget 2026 (PDF)

Handover Reports

Handover reports document the transition between executive committees and ensure continuity of our programs and initiatives.

item.title: Annual Subscription
item.description:
Annual Subscription

Become a member of the Jattaba Youth Development Association and support our mission throughout the year.

Membership Benefits

  • Regular updates on our projects and activities
  • Invitations to special events and programs
  • Opportunity to participate in decision-making
  • Recognition in our annual report

Subscription Options

Individual Membership

  • Annual fee: $50
  • Access to all member benefits
  • Voting rights at annual meetings

Student Membership

  • Annual fee: $25
  • Special rate for students
  • Access to mentorship programs

How to Subscribe

Contact us at email@example.com or visit our office to become a member today!

item.title: Donation
item.description:
Support Our Mission

Your generous donations help us continue our vital work in the community. Every contribution, no matter the size, makes a real difference in the lives of youth and families.

How Your Donation Helps

  • $25 - Provides school supplies for one student
  • $50 - Supports healthcare services for a family
  • $100 - Funds a week of educational programs
  • $500 - Contributes to infrastructure projects like the borehole or clinic
  • $1000+ - Enables major community development initiatives

Ways to Donate

Online Donation

Payment details coming soon

item.title: About Us
item.description:
Jattaba Youth Development Association (JYDA)

The Jattaba Youth Development Association (JYDA) is dedicated to empowering young individuals through various programs and initiatives aimed at fostering personal growth, community engagement, and skill development. Our mission is to create a supportive environment where youth can thrive, learn, and contribute positively to society.

Our Vision

We envision a world where every young person has the opportunity to realize their full potential and make meaningful contributions to their communities.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Contact Us

We would love to hear from you! Whether you have questions, want to get involved, or need more information about our programs, feel free to reach out.

Get in Touch

Email: email@example.com
Phone: +220 XXX XXXX
Address: Jattaba Community Center, Jattaba, The Gambia

Follow Us

Stay connected with us on social media to keep up with our latest events and initiatives:

  • Facebook: Facebook Page
  • Twitter: @TwitterHandle
  • Instagram: @InstagramHandle

We look forward to connecting with you!

item.title: Projects
item.description:
Jattaba Youth Development Association Projects

Welcome to the Jattaba Youth Development Association’s gallery! Here you can explore images showcasing our various projects and initiatives. Each image is accompanied by a caption to provide context and highlight the impact of our work.

Feel free to browse through our gallery and see the positive changes we are making in the community!

Primary Health Care

For many years, the old primary health care building stood still, leaving the community without access to essential medical services. Recognizing the critical need for basic healthcare, JYDA decided in 2017 to revitalize this vital facility. Through community effort and donor support, we renovated the building and reopened it to provide primary medical care and medication distribution to our community members.
